name: Typography Contract
description: Requires deliberate type hierarchy, readable documentation surfaces, and non-default type posture.

rules.check: headings, body, labels, and code must each have an explicit role
body copy should keep readable line lengths and avoid full-width paragraphs
code blocks must be scroll-safe, legible, and responsive
the profile should state why its type posture fits the product

remediation: Define type roles, tighten line length, add code-surface rules, and document the type posture in the active taste profile.
